posts.author: LibertyNorthBridge
posts.text: Important notice: The Northbridge Community Library will be closed for scheduled maintenance on Tuesday, 24th October. Staff are working to upgrade their digital archives and improve lighting in the reading rooms. We apologise for any inconvenience. Please check the website before visiting next week.
posts.explanation: This is a benign public notice about library maintenance that does not spread misinformation, soliciting harm, or reveal private details; it is safe to approve.
posts.bio: Fictional community notices and service updates.

posts.author: MoorvaleMarketFan
posts.text: Exciting news for everyone in Moorvale! The annual Spring Garden Show is taking place at the Community Centre this Saturday, 12th November. There will be beautiful flower displays, local artisan stalls selling crafts and homemade goods, and a live music performance by the Westbridge Jazz Trio starting at 10am.
posts.explanation: This is a harmless public event announcement promoting community activities without spreading misinformation or soliciting private data; it aligns with approved content for local culture and events.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.
